<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="AOS Training">
<meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0A2342">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json">
<title>AOS Training — Water Treatment Practice Exam</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Barlow:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
/* ── RESET & BASE ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
  --navy:     #0A2342;
  --navy2:    #0D2D54;
  --teal:     #006E8A;
  --teal2:    #00899E;
  --teallt:   #3AACCB;
  --gold:     #D4940A;
  --goldlt:   #F5C842;
  --white:    #FFFFFF;
  --offwhite: #F0F4F8;
  --card:     #FFFFFF;
  --correct:  #0E6B3F;
  --correctbg:#D4EDDA;
  --wrong:    #B91C1C;
  --wrongbg:  #FEE2E2;
  --neutral:  #E8F4F8;
  --border:   #C8D9E6;
  --text:     #111827;
  --muted:    #64748B;
  --shadow:   0 2px 12px rgba(10,35,66,0.10);
  --shadow-lg:0 6px 28px rgba(10,35,66,0.14);
  --radius:   10px;
  --font-head:'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
  --font-body:'Barlow', sans-serif;
  --transition: all 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  background: var(--offwhite);
  color: var(--text);
  min-height: 100vh;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

/* ── TOP NAV ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.topnav {
  background: var(--navy);
  padding: 0 28px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  height: 58px;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 100;
  border-bottom: 3px solid var(--gold);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
}
.brand {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.22rem;
  color: var(--white);
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.brand-dot {
  width: 8px; height: 8px;
  background: var(--goldlt);
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: inline-block;
}
.nav-meta {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: var(--goldlt);
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ── HERO ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hero {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy) 0%, var(--navy2) 55%, #0E3D6E 100%);
  padding: 56px 28px 44px;
  text-align: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 110%, rgba(0,110,138,0.28) 0%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.hero-kicker {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  color: var(--goldlt);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.hero h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 3.8rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--white);
  line-height: 1.05;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.hero h1 span { color: var(--goldlt); }
.hero-sub {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72);
  margin-bottom: 32px;
  max-width: 560px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
.hero-stats {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 28px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.stat {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 12px 22px;
  text-align: center;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
}
.stat-num {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: 1.8rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--goldlt);
  line-height: 1;
}
.stat-label {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  margin-top: 3px;
}

/* ── LAYOUT ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.container {
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 32px 20px 60px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 260px 1fr;
  gap: 28px;
  align-items: start;
}

/* ── SIDEBAR ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.sidebar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 74px;
  background: var(--card);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.sidebar-header {
  background: var(--teal);
  padding: 14px 18px;
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: var(--white);
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.subject-list {
  list-style: none;
  max-height: calc(100vh - 200px);
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: 8px 0;
}
.subject-list::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
.subject-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
.subject-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 4px; }
.subject-item {
  padding: 0;
}
.subject-btn {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 9px 16px;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-align: left;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: var(--text);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 8px;
  transition: var(--transition);
  border-left: 3px solid transparent;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.subject-btn:hover {
  background: var(--neutral);
  border-left-color: var(--teallt);
  color: var(--teal);
}
.subject-btn.active {
  background: #E0F3F8;
  border-left-color: var(--teal);
  color: var(--teal);
  font-weight: 600;
}
.subject-count {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  background: var(--navy);
  color: var(--white);
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 2px 7px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  min-width: 28px;
  text-align: center;
}
.subject-btn.active .subject-count { background: var(--teal); }

/* ── MAIN CONTENT ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.main-content { min-width: 0; }

/* ── QUIZ CONTROLS BAR ────────────────────────────────────── */
.controls-bar {
  background: var(--card);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
  padding: 16px 22px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.controls-bar .section-title {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  color: var(--navy);
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
.btn {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  padding: 8px 18px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.btn-primary {
  background: var(--teal);
  color: var(--white);
}
.btn-primary:hover { background: var(--teal2); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,110,138,0.3); }
.btn-gold {
  background: var(--gold);
  color: var(--white);
}
.btn-gold:hover { background: #B87C08; transform: translateY(-1px); }
.btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--teal);
  border: 2px solid var(--teal);
}
.btn-outline:hover { background: var(--teal); color: var(--white); }
.btn-sm { padding: 5px 12px; font-size: 0.78rem; }

/* ── PROGRESS BAR ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.progress-wrap {
  background: var(--card);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 14px 22px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
}
.progress-meta {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}
.progress-bar-track {
  height: 8px;
  background: var(--border);
  border-radius: 99px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.progress-bar-fill {
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--teal), var(--teallt));
  border-radius: 99px;
  transition: width 0.4s ease;
}
.score-pills {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 10px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.pill {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 3px 12px;
  border-radius: 99px;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}
.pill-correct { background: var(--correctbg); color: var(--correct); }
.pill-wrong   { background: var(--wrongbg);   color: var(--wrong); }
.pill-remain  { background: var(--neutral);   color: var(--teal); }

/* ── QUESTION CARD ────────────────────────────────────────── */
.question-card {
  background: var(--card);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  overflow: hidden;
  animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease;
}
@keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

.q-header {
  background: var(--navy);
  padding: 10px 20px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
}
.q-num {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--goldlt);
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
}
.q-subject-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.q-status-badge {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 99px;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
}
.badge-correct { background: var(--correctbg); color: var(--correct); }
.badge-wrong   { background: var(--wrongbg);   color: var(--wrong); }

.q-body { padding: 22px 24px 18px; }
.q-text {
  font-size: 1.06rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--text);
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

/* ── ANSWER OPTIONS ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.options { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
.option-btn {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 13px 18px;
  background: var(--neutral);
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 8px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
  text-align: left;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: var(--text);
  width: 100%;
  position: relative;
}
.option-btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
  border-color: var(--teal);
  background: #D8EFF5;
  transform: translateX(3px);
}
.option-btn:disabled { cursor: default; }
.option-letter {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 32px; height: 32px;
  background: var(--teal);
  color: var(--white);
  border-radius: 6px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1rem;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.option-text { flex: 1; line-height: 1.45; }

.option-btn.selected-correct {
  background: var(--correctbg);
  border-color: var(--correct);
}
.option-btn.selected-correct .option-letter { background: var(--correct); }

.option-btn.selected-wrong {
  background: var(--wrongbg);
  border-color: var(--wrong);
}
.option-btn.selected-wrong .option-letter { background: var(--wrong); }

.option-btn.reveal-correct {
  background: var(--correctbg);
  border-color: var(--correct);
  opacity: 0.85;
}
.option-btn.reveal-correct .option-letter { background: var(--correct); }

.option-icon {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}
.option-btn.selected-correct .option-icon,
.option-btn.selected-wrong .option-icon,
.option-btn.reveal-correct .option-icon { opacity: 1; }

/* ── FEEDBACK ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.feedback {
  margin-top: 16px;
  padding: 12px 18px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  display: none;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  animation: fadeIn 0.25s ease;
}
.feedback.show { display: flex; }
.feedback-correct { background: var(--correctbg); color: var(--correct); border-left: 4px solid var(--correct); }
.feedback-wrong   { background: var(--wrongbg);   color: var(--wrong);   border-left: 4px solid var(--wrong); }
.feedback-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* ── ANSWER KEY PANEL ─────────────────────────────────────── */
.answer-key-panel {
  background: var(--card);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
  margin-top: 28px;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: none;
}
.answer-key-panel.show { display: block; }
.ak-header {
  background: #004F65;
  padding: 14px 22px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
}
.ak-title {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: var(--white);
  flex: 1;
}
.ak-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr));
  gap: 0;
  padding: 0;
}
.ak-row {
  padding: 10px 16px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 10px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #EEF3F7;
  border-right: 1px solid #EEF3F7;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.ak-row:hover { background: #F4FAFC; }
.ak-row.user-correct { background: #F0FBF5; }
.ak-row.user-wrong   { background: #FFF5F5; }
.ak-qnum {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  background: var(--teal);
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 2px 7px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  min-width: 32px;
  text-align: center;
}
.ak-letter {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  width: 22px; height: 22px;
  background: var(--correct);
  color: var(--white);
  border-radius: 4px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.ak-answer {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: var(--correct);
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1.35;
}
.ak-row.user-wrong .ak-qnum { background: var(--wrong); }

/* ── RESULTS SCREEN ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.results-screen {
  background: var(--card);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
  padding: 36px 32px;
  text-align: center;
  display: none;
}
.results-screen.show { display: block; }
.results-icon { font-size: 3.5rem; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.results-title {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--navy);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.results-score {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: 4rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--teal);
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 16px 0;
}
.results-sub { color: var(--muted); font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.results-breakdown {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 24px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 28px;
}
.breakdown-item {
  padding: 14px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  min-width: 120px;
}
.breakdown-num {
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1;
}
.breakdown-label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; }
.grade-A { background: var(--correctbg); }
.grade-A .breakdown-num { color: var(--correct); }
.grade-B { background: #DBEAFE; }
.grade-B .breakdown-num { color: #1D4ED8; }
.grade-F { background: var(--wrongbg); }
.grade-F .breakdown-num { color: var(--wrong); }
.results-btns { display: flex; gap: 12px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }

/* ── QUIZ MODE SELECTOR ───────────────────────────────────── */
.mode-bar {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  background: var(--offwhite);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 4px;
}
.mode-btn {
  flex: 1;
  font-family: var(--font-head);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--muted);
  transition: var(--transition);
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.mode-btn.active {
  background: var(--teal);
  color: var(--white);
}

/* ── FOOTER ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.footer {
  background: var(--navy);
  border-top: 3px solid var(--gold);
  padding: 28px 24px;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 60px;
}
.footer p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size: 0.82rem; }
.footer a { color: var(--goldlt); text-decoration: none; }
.footer a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

/* ── RESPONSIVE ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .container { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .sidebar { position: static; }
  .subject-list { max-height: 200px; }
  .hero { padding: 36px 16px 28px; }
  .hero-stats { gap: 14px; }
}

/* ── UTILITY ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hidden { display: none !important; }
.text-center { text-align: center; }

/* ── PASSWORD SCREEN ──────────────────────────────────────── */
#passwordScreen {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0A2342 0%, #0D2D54 50%, #0E3D6E 100%);
  z-index: 9999;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 24px;
}
.pw-logo {
  width: 90px; height: 90px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 2px solid rgba(212,148,10,0.6);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  object-fit: cover;
}
.pw-app-name {
  font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #FFFFFF;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.pw-tagline {
  font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  margin-bottom: 36px;
  text-align: center;
}
.pw-box {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14);
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 32px 28px;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 360px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  text-align: center;
}
.pw-label {
  font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  color: #F5C842;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.pw-input {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-align: center;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
  border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.20);
  border-radius: 10px;
  color: #FFFFFF;
  outline: none;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.pw-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-size: 1rem; }
.pw-input:focus { border-color: #D4940A; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); }
.pw-input.shake {
  animation: shake 0.4s ease;
  border-color: #B91C1C;
}
@keyframes shake {
  0%,100% { transform: translateX(0); }
  20%      { transform: translateX(-8px); }
  40%      { transform: translateX(8px); }
  60%      { transform: translateX(-6px); }
  80%      { transform: translateX(6px); }
}
.pw-btn {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 14px;
  background: #D4940A;
  color: #FFFFFF;
  font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.pw-btn:hover { background: #B87C08; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(212,148,10,0.4); }
.pw-btn:active { transform: translateY(0); }
.pw-error {
  margin-top: 14px;
  color: #FCA5A5;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
  min-height: 20px;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}
.pw-footer {
  margin-top: 28px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.28);
  font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
  text-align: center;
}
#appContent { display: none; }

</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- PASSWORD SCREEN -->
<div id="passwordScreen">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="AOS Logo" class="pw-logo">
  <div class="pw-app-name">AOS Training</div>
  <div class="pw-tagline">Operator Certification Practice Exams<br>Arizona &amp; New Mexico</div>
  <div class="pw-box">
    <div class="pw-label">🔒 Enter Access Code</div>
    <input
      type="password"
      id="pwInput"
      class="pw-input"
      placeholder="Enter code"
      maxlength="20"
      autocomplete="off"
      onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter') checkPassword()"
    >
    <button class="pw-btn" onclick="checkPassword()">UNLOCK TRAINING ▶</button>
    <div class="pw-error" id="pwError"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="pw-footer">AOS Utility Services · azops.org<br>Contact your instructor for access</div>
</div>

<!-- APP CONTENT (hidden until unlocked) -->
<div id="appContent">

<!-- TOP NAV -->
<nav class="topnav">
  <a href="https://azops.org" class="brand">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="AOS Logo" style="height:34px;width:34px;border-radius:4px;object-fit:cover;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);">
    AOS Utility Services
  </a>
  <span class="nav-meta">OPERATOR CERTIFICATION TRAINING</span>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<header class="hero">
  <div style="margin-bottom:16px;">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="AOS Utility Services Logo" style="height:72px;width:72px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid rgba(212,148,10,0.5);box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);">
  </div>
  <div class="hero-kicker">Arizona &amp; New Mexico · Levels I–II</div>
  <h1>Water Treatment<br><span>Practice Exam</span></h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">Based on the 2025 Need-to-Know Criteria · 24 Subject Areas · Prepared by Paul Cornejo, AZ/NM 4x4</p>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num" id="stat-total">332</div><div class="stat-label">Questions</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">24</div><div class="stat-label">Subjects</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num" id="stat-answered">0</div><div class="stat-label">Answered</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num" id="stat-pct">0%</div><div class="stat-label">Score</div></div>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- MAIN LAYOUT -->
<div class="container">

  <!-- SIDEBAR -->
  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-header">📚 Subject Areas</div>
    <ul class="subject-list" id="subjectList"></ul>
  </aside>

  <!-- MAIN -->
  <main class="main-content">

    <!-- Controls bar -->
    <div class="controls-bar">
      <div class="section-title" id="sectionTitle">Select a subject to begin</div>
      <div class="mode-bar">
        <button class="mode-btn active" id="modeStudy" onclick="setMode('study')">Study</button>
        <button class="mode-btn" id="modeExam" onclick="setMode('exam')">Exam</button>
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-gold btn-sm" onclick="shuffleQuestions()">🔀 Shuffle</button>
      <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="resetSection()">↺ Reset</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Progress -->
    <div class="progress-wrap" id="progressWrap">
      <div class="progress-meta">
        <span id="progressText">0 of 0 answered</span>
        <span id="progressPct">0%</span>
      </div>
      <div class="progress-bar-track">
        <div class="progress-bar-fill" id="progressFill" style="width:0%"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="score-pills">
        <span class="pill pill-correct" id="pillCorrect">✓ 0 Correct</span>
        <span class="pill pill-wrong"   id="pillWrong">✗ 0 Wrong</span>
        <span class="pill pill-remain"  id="pillRemain">◌ 0 Remaining</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Questions container -->
    <div id="questionsContainer"></div>

    <!-- Results screen -->
    <div class="results-screen" id="resultsScreen">
      <div class="results-icon" id="resultsIcon">🎯</div>
      <div class="results-title" id="resultsTitle">Section Complete!</div>
      <div class="results-score" id="resultsScore">—</div>
      <div class="results-sub" id="resultsSub"></div>
      <div class="results-breakdown">
        <div class="breakdown-item grade-A">
          <div class="breakdown-num" id="resCorrect">0</div>
          <div class="breakdown-label">Correct</div>
        </div>
        <div class="breakdown-item grade-F">
          <div class="breakdown-num" id="resWrong">0</div>
          <div class="breakdown-label">Wrong</div>
        </div>
        <div class="breakdown-item grade-B">
          <div class="breakdown-num" id="resTotal">0</div>
          <div class="breakdown-label">Total</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="results-btns">
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="resetSection()">↺ Retry Section</button>
        <button class="btn btn-gold"    onclick="showAnswerKey()">📋 Answer Key</button>
        <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="shuffleQuestions()">🔀 Shuffle &amp; Retry</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Answer key panel -->
    <div class="answer-key-panel" id="answerKeyPanel">
      <div class="ak-header">
        <div class="ak-title" id="akTitle">Answer Key</div>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;border:none;" onclick="hideAnswerKey()">✕ Close</button>
      </div>
      <div class="ak-grid" id="akGrid"></div>
    </div>

  </main>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer class="footer">
  <p>
    <strong style="color:#fff">AOS Utility Services</strong> ·
    <a href="https://azops.org">azops.org</a> ·
    Operator Certification Training for Arizona &amp; New Mexico
  </p>
  <p style="margin-top:6px">Prepared by Paul Cornejo · AZ &amp; NM 4x4 · Based on 2025 Need-to-Know Criteria</p>
</footer>

<script>
// ── DATA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// ALL_QUESTIONS loaded after unlock

// ── STATE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let currentSubject  = null;
let currentQuestions = [];
// ── ENCRYPTED QUESTION DATA ──────────────────────────────────────────────
const ENCRYPTED_PAYLOAD = {
  salt: "xHYhkRgG5WZrx03/BT1Tqw==",
  iv:   "DDMTKxJ+XBkq23Ql",
  data: ""
};

let ALL_QUESTIONS = null;

async function decryptQuestions(accessCode) {
  const fromBase64 = s => Uint8Array.from(atob(s), c => c.charCodeAt(0));
  const enc = new TextEncoder();
  try {
    const keyMaterial = await crypto.subtle.importKey(
      'raw', enc.encode(accessCode.trim().toUpperCase()),
      { name: 'PBKDF2' }, false, ['deriveKey']
    );
    const key = await crypto.subtle.deriveKey(
      { name: 'PBKDF2', salt: fromBase64(ENCRYPTED_PAYLOAD.salt),
         iterations: 100000, hash: 'SHA-256' },
      keyMaterial, { name: 'AES-GCM', length: 256 }, false, ['decrypt']
    );
    const plaintext = await crypto.subtle.decrypt(
      { name: 'AES-GCM', iv: fromBase64(ENCRYPTED_PAYLOAD.iv) },
      key, fromBase64(ENCRYPTED_PAYLOAD.data)
    );
    return JSON.parse(new TextDecoder().decode(plaintext));
  } catch (e) { return null; }
}

let answers = {};   // { qIndex: { selected, correct } }
let mode = 'study'; // 'study' | 'exam'
let examSubmitted = false;

// ── INIT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function init() {
  buildSubjectList();
  updateHeroStats();
}

function buildSubjectList() {
  if (!ALL_QUESTIONS) return;
  const subjects = [...new Set(ALL_QUESTIONS.map(q => q.subject))];
  const list = document.getElementById('subjectList');
  list.innerHTML = '';
  subjects.forEach(subj => {
    const count = ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q => q.subject === subj).length;
    const li = document.createElement('li');
    li.className = 'subject-item';
    li.innerHTML = `<button class="subject-btn" onclick="loadSubject('${subj.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')">
      <span>${subj}</span>
      <span class="subject-count">${count}</span>
    </button>`;
    list.appendChild(li);
  });
}

function updateHeroStats() {
  if (!ALL_QUESTIONS) return;
  const total    = ALL_QUESTIONS.length;
  const answered = Object.keys(answers).length;
  const correct  = Object.values(answers).filter(a => a.correct).length;
  const pct = answered ? Math.round(correct / answered * 100) : 0;
  document.getElementById('stat-total').textContent    = total;
  document.getElementById('stat-answered').textContent = answered;
  document.getElementById('stat-pct').textContent      = answered ? pct + '%' : '0%';
}

// ── SUBJECT LOADING ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function loadSubject(subj) {
  currentSubject   = subj;
  currentQuestions = ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q => q.subject === subj);
  answers          = {};
  examSubmitted    = false;

  // Update sidebar active state
  document.querySelectorAll('.subject-btn').forEach(btn => {
    btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.querySelector('span').textContent === subj);
  });

  document.getElementById('sectionTitle').textContent = subj;
  document.getElementById('resultsScreen').classList.remove('show');
  hideAnswerKey();
  renderQuestions();
  updateProgress();
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

// ── RENDER QUESTIONS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderQuestions() {
  const container = document.getElementById('questionsContainer');
  container.innerHTML = '';

  currentQuestions.forEach((q, i) => {
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'question-card';
    card.id = `qcard-${i}`;

    const opts = [
      { letter: 'A', text: q.a },
      { letter: 'B', text: q.b },
      { letter: 'C', text: q.c },
    ].filter(o => o.text);

    const answered = answers[i];
    let statusBadge = '';
    if (answered) {
      statusBadge = answered.correct
        ? `<span class="q-status-badge badge-correct">✓ Correct</span>`
        : `<span class="q-status-badge badge-wrong">✗ Incorrect</span>`;
    }

    card.innerHTML = `
      <div class="q-header">
        <span class="q-num">Q${q.num}</span>
        <span class="q-subject-tag">${q.subject}</span>
        ${statusBadge}
      </div>
      <div class="q-body">
        <div class="q-text">${q.q}</div>
        <div class="options" id="opts-${i}">
          ${opts.map(o => renderOption(o, i, q, answered)).join('')}
        </div>
        <div class="feedback ${answered ? 'show ' + (answered.correct ? 'feedback-correct' : 'feedback-wrong') : ''}" id="fb-${i}">
          ${answered ? `<span class="feedback-icon">${answered.correct ? '✅' : '❌'}</span>
          <span>${answered.correct
            ? `Correct! The answer is <strong>${q.correct}. ${q.answerText}</strong>`
            : `Incorrect. The correct answer is <strong>${q.correct}. ${q.answerText}</strong>`
          }</span>` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    container.appendChild(card);
  });

  // In exam mode, if not submitted, hide feedback
  if (mode === 'exam' && !examSubmitted) {
    container.querySelectorAll('.feedback').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('show'));
  }
}

function renderOption(opt, qIdx, q, answered) {
  let cls = 'option-btn';
  let icon = '';
  const isCorrect = opt.letter === q.correct;
  const isSelected = answered && answered.selected === opt.letter;

  if (answered && (mode === 'study' || examSubmitted)) {
    if (isSelected && isCorrect)   { cls += ' selected-correct'; icon = '✓'; }
    else if (isSelected && !isCorrect) { cls += ' selected-wrong'; icon = '✗'; }
    else if (isCorrect)            { cls += ' reveal-correct'; icon = '✓'; }
  } else if (answered && isSelected) {
    cls += ' selected-correct'; // exam, not submitted — just show selected
  }

  const disabled = (answered && (mode === 'study' || examSubmitted)) ? 'disabled' : '';

  return `<button class="${cls}" ${disabled} onclick="selectAnswer(${qIdx}, '${opt.letter}')">
    <span class="option-letter">${opt.letter}</span>
    <span class="option-text">${opt.text}</span>
    <span class="option-icon">${icon}</span>
  </button>`;
}

// ── ANSWER SELECTION ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
function selectAnswer(qIdx, letter) {
  const q = currentQuestions[qIdx];
  const isCorrect = letter === q.correct;

  if (mode === 'study') {
    // Immediate feedback
    if (answers[qIdx]) return; // already answered
    answers[qIdx] = { selected: letter, correct: isCorrect };
    refreshQuestion(qIdx);
    updateProgress();
    updateHeroStats();

    // Auto-scroll to next unanswered question
    if (Object.keys(answers).length < currentQuestions.length) {
      setTimeout(() => {
        const nextIdx = currentQuestions.findIndex((_, i) => i > qIdx && !answers[i]);
        if (nextIdx !== -1) {
          const nextCard = document.getElementById(`qcard-${nextIdx}`);
          if (nextCard) nextCard.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
        }
      }, 600);
    } else {
      setTimeout(showResults, 800);
    }
  } else {
    // Exam mode: just track selection, no feedback yet
    answers[qIdx] = { selected: letter, correct: isCorrect };
    refreshQuestion(qIdx);
    updateProgress();
    // Check if all answered
    if (Object.keys(answers).length === currentQuestions.length && !examSubmitted) {
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (confirm('All questions answered. Submit your exam?')) submitExam();
      }, 300);
    }
  }
}

function refreshQuestion(qIdx) {
  const q   = currentQuestions[qIdx];
  const ans = answers[qIdx];
  const opts = [
    { letter: 'A', text: q.a },
    { letter: 'B', text: q.b },
    { letter: 'C', text: q.c },
  ].filter(o => o.text);

  const optsEl = document.getElementById(`opts-${qIdx}`);
  if (optsEl) optsEl.innerHTML = opts.map(o => renderOption(o, qIdx, q, ans)).join('');

  const fb = document.getElementById(`fb-${qIdx}`);
  if (fb && (mode === 'study' || examSubmitted)) {
    fb.className = `feedback show ${ans.correct ? 'feedback-correct' : 'feedback-wrong'}`;
    fb.innerHTML = `<span class="feedback-icon">${ans.correct ? '✅' : '❌'}</span>
      <span>${ans.correct
        ? `Correct! The answer is <strong>${q.correct}. ${q.answerText}</strong>`
        : `Incorrect. The correct answer is <strong>${q.correct}. ${q.answerText}</strong>`
      }</span>`;
  }

  // Update card header badge
  const card = document.getElementById(`qcard-${qIdx}`);
  if (card) {
    const existing = card.querySelector('.q-status-badge');
    if (existing) existing.remove();
    const badge = document.createElement('span');
    badge.className = `q-status-badge ${ans.correct ? 'badge-correct' : 'badge-wrong'}`;
    badge.textContent = ans.correct ? '✓ Correct' : '✗ Incorrect';
    card.querySelector('.q-header').appendChild(badge);
  }
}

// ── EXAM MODE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function submitExam() {
  examSubmitted = true;
  renderQuestions();
  updateProgress();
  showResults();
}

// ── PROGRESS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function updateProgress() {
  const total    = currentQuestions.length;
  const answered = Object.keys(answers).length;
  const correct  = Object.values(answers).filter(a => a.correct).length;
  const wrong    = answered - correct;
  const pct      = total ? Math.round(answered / total * 100) : 0;

  document.getElementById('progressText').textContent = `${answered} of ${total} answered`;
  document.getElementById('progressPct').textContent  = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('pillCorrect').textContent  = `✓ ${correct} Correct`;
  document.getElementById('pillWrong').textContent    = `✗ ${wrong} Wrong`;
  document.getElementById('pillRemain').textContent   = `◌ ${total - answered} Remaining`;
}

// ── RESULTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showResults() {
  const total   = currentQuestions.length;
  const correct = Object.values(answers).filter(a => a.correct).length;
  const wrong   = total - correct;
  const pct     = Math.round(correct / total * 100);

  let icon  = pct >= 80 ? '🏆' : pct >= 65 ? '📚' : '💪';
  let title = pct >= 80 ? 'Great Work!' : pct >= 65 ? 'Good Effort!' : 'Keep Studying!';
  let sub   = `You answered ${correct} of ${total} questions correctly.`;
  if (pct >= 70) sub += ' You may be ready for the exam!';
  else sub += ' Review the answer key and try again.';

  document.getElementById('resultsIcon').textContent  = icon;
  document.getElementById('resultsTitle').textContent = title;
  document.getElementById('resultsScore').textContent = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('resultsSub').textContent   = sub;
  document.getElementById('resCorrect').textContent   = correct;
  document.getElementById('resWrong').textContent     = wrong;
  document.getElementById('resTotal').textContent     = total;
  document.getElementById('resultsScreen').classList.add('show');
  document.getElementById('resultsScreen').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
}

// ── ANSWER KEY ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showAnswerKey() {
  const panel = document.getElementById('answerKeyPanel');
  const grid  = document.getElementById('akGrid');
  document.getElementById('akTitle').textContent = `Answer Key — ${currentSubject}`;

  grid.innerHTML = currentQuestions.map((q, i) => {
    const ans = answers[i];
    let rowCls = 'ak-row';
    if (ans) rowCls += ans.correct ? ' user-correct' : ' user-wrong';
    return `<div class="${rowCls}">
      <span class="ak-qnum">Q${q.num}</span>
      <span class="ak-letter">${q.correct}</span>
      <div class="ak-answer">${q.answerText}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  panel.classList.add('show');
  panel.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
}

function hideAnswerKey() {
  document.getElementById('answerKeyPanel').classList.remove('show');
}

// ── CONTROLS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function setMode(m) {
  mode = m;
  document.getElementById('modeStudy').classList.toggle('active', m === 'study');
  document.getElementById('modeExam').classList.toggle('active', m === 'exam');
  if (currentSubject) resetSection();
}

function shuffleQuestions() {
  if (!currentSubject) return;
  currentQuestions = [...currentQuestions].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
  answers = {};
  examSubmitted = false;
  document.getElementById('resultsScreen').classList.remove('show');
  hideAnswerKey();
  renderQuestions();
  updateProgress();
}

function resetSection() {
  if (!currentSubject) return;
  currentQuestions = ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q => q.subject === currentSubject);
  answers = {};
  examSubmitted = false;
  document.getElementById('resultsScreen').classList.remove('show');
  hideAnswerKey();
  renderQuestions();
  updateProgress();
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}


// ── PASSWORD GATE ──────────────────────────────────────────
// ACCESS_CODE removed

async function checkPassword() {
  const val = document.getElementById('pwInput').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  const err = document.getElementById('pwError');
  const inp = document.getElementById('pwInput');
  const btn = document.querySelector('.pw-btn');
  btn.textContent = 'Verifying…';
  btn.disabled = true;
  err.textContent = '';
  const questions = await decryptQuestions(val);
  if (questions) {
    ALL_QUESTIONS = questions;
    sessionStorage.setItem('aos_unlocked', '1');
    sessionStorage.setItem('aos_code', val);
    const screen = document.getElementById('passwordScreen');
    screen.style.transition = 'opacity 0.5s ease';
    screen.style.opacity = '0';
    setTimeout(() => {
      screen.style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('appContent').style.display = 'block';
      buildSubjectList();
      updateHeroStats();
    }, 500);
  } else {
    btn.textContent = 'UNLOCK TRAINING ▶';
    btn.disabled = false;
    inp.classList.remove('shake');
    void inp.offsetWidth;
    inp.classList.add('shake');
    err.textContent = 'Incorrect code. Please try again.';
    inp.value = '';
    setTimeout(() => { inp.classList.remove('shake'); err.textContent = ''; }, 2000);
  }
}

(async () => {
  if (sessionStorage.getItem('aos_unlocked') === '1') {
    const storedCode = sessionStorage.getItem('aos_code');
    if (storedCode) {
      const questions = await decryptQuestions(storedCode);
      if (questions) {
        ALL_QUESTIONS = questions;
        document.getElementById('passwordScreen').style.display = 'none';
        document.getElementById('appContent').style.display = 'block';
        buildSubjectList();
        updateHeroStats();
        return;
      }
    }
    sessionStorage.removeItem('aos_unlocked');
    sessionStorage.removeItem('aos_code');
  }
})();

// Allow Enter key on load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const inp = document.getElementById('pwInput');
  if (inp) inp.focus();
});

// ── BOOT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// init() called after unlock
</script>
</div><!-- end appContent -->

<script>
if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
  window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js')
      .then(() => console.log('AOS Training: offline ready'))
      .catch(e => console.log('SW error:', e));
  });
}
</script>

</body>
</html>
